name: Basil Hawkins - OP07-029 (Reprint)
effect_text: If your Leader has the [Supernovas] type, this Character gains [Blocker]. (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[Once Per Turn] If this Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may rest 1 of your opponent's Characters instead.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
